title: Tokyo Metro geometry/inventory pilot corridor selection
scope: PR-015 selects a short Tokyo Metro corridor for inventory, OSM structure-tag, and ground-DEM adapter wiring only. No rail elevation package and no public Tokyo Metro dataset are published.

name.ja: 東京メトロ銀座線 上野–浅草

rationale: Short, continuous urban subway segment suitable for adapter integration tests.
Covered by national railway inventory sources (N02 role) as line/station inventory candidate.
Likely OSM structure-tag coverage for underground alignment hints (not metric Z).
Falls inside standard GSI DEM national ground-elevation coverage.
Does not imply any approved public rail elevation or relative-depth control source.

selectionCriteria.description: Corridor must be representable as N02-style operator/line/station inventory candidates.
Corridor must be a plausible OSM railway extract target for structure tags only (tunnel/bridge/layer as hints).
Corridor bounds must lie inside a planned GSI DEM ground-elevation product coverage.
Selection must explicitly refuse public rail-elevation packaging until approved control points exist.
Public package remains blocked while any required source has unknown or disallowed redistribution.

inventory-candidate.evidence: Corridor is a named Tokyo Metro passenger line segment; N02 adapter role is inventory-only.

osm-structure-candidate.evidence: OSM parse adapter accepts synthetic railway ways/stations; real snapshot remains planned-not-fetched.

gsi-dem-ground-coverage.evidence: Bounds are within Tokyo; GSI DEM adapter accepts ground grids only with known vertical datum.

no-public-rail-elevation-claim.evidence: selectionStatus is geometry-inventory-pilot; publicPackageDecision is blocked for elevation package.

redistribution-gate.evidence: No public Tokyo Metro package is emitted; only this selection plan and synthetic adapter fixtures may be published.

osm-pbf.plannedExtract: Kanto railway extract snapshot not fetched in PR-015
osm-pbf.role: Detailed alignment and structure-tag candidate only; never metric Z

gsi-dem.plannedProduct: DEM product and mesh revision not fixed to a retrieved snapshot in PR-015
gsi-dem.role: Ground elevation / terrain only; never rail elevation

manual-control-points.plannedRegistry: No Tokyo Metro public rail elevation controls approved
manual-control-points.role: Future rail elevation / relative depth after license and definition review

publicPackageDecision: blocked: geometry-inventory pilot only. Do not publish real Tokyo Metro geometry, DEM, or elevation packages until fixed real snapshots, ODbL/GSI redistribution handling, and approved rail elevation controls are in place.
unresolvedGates: Fetch and pin exact N02 release bytes for the corridor inventory extract.
Choose OSM PBF provider + snapshot date and keep ODbL-derived outputs license-separated.
Choose exact GSI DEM mesh product/revision and confirm post-2025-07-31 datum metadata.
Obtain redistribution-approved rail elevation or relative-depth controls before any public Z package.
Conflation review process for N02 inventory vs OSM geometry conflicts remains open.
